name: Jollof Rice
instructions: Blend tomatoes, pepper, and onions. Fry the mixture in oil, add seasoning, meat stock and water, then the rice, cook until tender.

name: Yam Porridge
instructions: Boil yam with pepper and onions. Add palm oil, crayfish, seasoning, and cook until soft.

name: Zobo Drink
instructions: Boil hibiscus leaves with ginger and clove, strain, add pineapple juice, and chill before serving.

name: Kunu Aya
instructions: Blend soaked tiger nuts, dates, and coconut with water, then strain and refrigerate.

name: Moi Moi
instructions: Blend peeled beans with pepper and onions, mix with oil and seasoning, pour into moulds, add egg if desired, and steam until firm.

name: Fried Rice
instructions: Cook the rice separately. Stir-fry vegetables and liver, then combine with the cooked rice, season and soy sauce.
